entities.description: A curated collection of 300 genetically diverse accessions.

relationships.description: The reference set is composed of chickpea accessions
The reference set consists of 300 genetically diverse accessions
The reference set captured 1315 alleles from the composite collection
Alleles are the genetic variants found within the composite collection
The reference set represents the genetic diversity of the composite collection
